passive.name: Happy Hour
passive.description: Gragas periodically heals upon using a skill.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} Every few seconds, {{ci|Gragas}} will {{tip|heal}} a portion of {{as|his '''maximum''' health}} upon casting an ability.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} Periodically, after casting an [[Champion ability|ability]], '''Gragas''' {{tip|heals}} himself for {{as|{{sti|health|{{fd|5.5}}% of his '''maximum''' health}}}}.

Q.name: Barrel Roll
Q.description: Gragas rolls his cask to a location, which can be activated to explode or will explode on its own after 4 seconds. The potency of the explosion increases over time. Enemies struck by the blast have their Move Speed slowed.
Q.tooltip:
Gragas rolls a cask that explodes after {{ e4 }} seconds, dealing between {{ mindamage }} magic damage and {{ maxdamage }} magic damage and Slowing for between {{ e2 }} and {{ effect2amount*1.5 }}% for {{ e3 }} seconds. The damage and Slow increase with time the cask spent before exploding. 

Gragas can Recast to detonate the cask early.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Gragas}} rolls a cask to the target location that lingers for a short time before exploding. ''Barrel Roll'' can be recast within the duration once it fully travels.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Gragas''' detonates the cast, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowing}} nearby enemies. The effects are increased based on how long the cask lingered.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Gragas''' rolls a cask to the target location, remaining there for 4 seconds and granting {{tip|sight}} of the area. Upon arrival, the cask starts to ferment over the first 2 seconds of its duration to increase its {{ccs|damage|magic}} and the effectiveness of its {{tip|slow}}, up to a maximum of 150% of their initial values. ''Barrel Roll'' can be recast at any time within its duration after the cask has fully travelled, and does so automatically after its duration ends.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Gragas''' detonates the cask, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies, reduced by 30% against {{tip|minion|minions}}, and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them for 2 seconds.
wiki_detail.notes:
*The initial cast counts as an ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
**Deactivating the ability manually does not.
* The cask ignores unit and terrain collision therefore it will only stop once it reaches the target location.
** On arrival the cask will begin to glow ever brighter as it ferments until it turns bright red.
* ''Barrel Roll'' has an internal cooldown while traveling so that '''Gragas''' may only make it explode on arrival.
* The charge-up countdown will only start once the cask stops rolling.
{{Effect at cast time end}}

W.name: Drunken Rage
W.description: Gragas samples his latest brew for 1 second. After finishing, he becomes boisterous and belligerent, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies on his next basic attack and reducing damage received.
W.tooltip: Gragas samples his brew, reducing incoming damage by {{ damagereduction }} for {{ defenseduration }} seconds and empowering his next Attack to deal an additional {{ totaldamage }} plus {{ maxhppercentdamage }}% max Health magic damage to the target and surrounding enemies.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb2: His next {{tip|basic attack}} will deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} to the target and nearby enemies based on each {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Gragas''' {{tip|channel|channels}} for {{fd|0.75}} seconds, drinking out of his brew, and gains damage reduction for {{fd|2.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: Upon completing the channel, '''Gragas''' empowers his next [[basic attack]] within 5 seconds to have an {{tip|uncancellable windup}}, gain {{sti|range|50 '''bonus''' range}} and deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} to the target and nearby enemies, reduced to 50% against [[structures]] and capped at 300 against {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Bonus Magic Damage|{{ap|20 to 140}} {{as|(+ 7% of target's '''maximum''' health)}} {{as|(+ 70% AP)}}}}
{{st|Capped Monster Damage|{{ap|320 to 440}} {{as|(+ 70% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The enhanced attack will apply other [[on-hit effect]]s and can {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}} as normal.
* The empowered attack will trigger against [[structures]].
* The empowered attack will trigger against [[ward]]s but not be consumed nor apply its effects against [[ward]]s.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Gragas''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
{{ct|channel|attack=false|cast=false|items=false,true|move=true|spells=true,true,false,false,false}}

E.name: Body Slam
E.description: Gragas charges to a location and collides with the first enemy unit he comes across, dealing damage to all nearby enemy units and stunning them.
E.tooltip:
Gragas charges forward, colliding with the first enemy, Knocking Up nearby enemies for {{ stunduration }} second and dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to them.

This Ability's Cooldown is reduced by {{ cooldownrefund*100 }}% if Gragas collides with an enemy.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ci|Gragas}} {{tip|dash|charges}} in the target direction, stopping upon the first enemy hit, which deals {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies, {{tip|airborne|knocks them back}}, and {{tip|stun|stuns}} them.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If ''Body Slam'' hits an enemy, the cooldown is {{sti|ah|reduced}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Gragas''' {{tip|dash|charges}} in the target direction and stops upon colliding with an enemy, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to all nearby enemies, {{tip|airborne|knocking them back}}, though not through terrain, and {{tip|stun|stunning}} them for 1 second.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Body Slam's'' {{sti|'''current''' cooldown}} is reduced by 40% if '''Gragas''' hits an enemy.
wiki_detail.description3: ''{{ai|Barrel Roll|Gragas}} and {{ai|Explosive Cask|Gragas}} can be cast during the dash.''
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|180|Center-to-edge collision. Centered on the location 40 units in front of Gragas, triggered periodically during the dash and once when the dash ends or is interrupted}}
wiki_detail.parry:
|notes        = 
* {{si|Flash}} can be casted during ''Body Slam'', instantly ending it and affecting enemies at the flash location.
* Units hit by ''Body Slam'' turn away from '''Gragas'''.
* {{tip|Displacement immunity}} will not resist the application of the {{tip|stun}}.

R.name: Explosive Cask
R.description: Gragas hurls his cask to a location, dealing damage and knocking back enemies caught in the blast radius.
R.tooltip: Gragas hurls his cask, dealing {{ damagedone }} magic damage and Knocking Away enemies from the impact zone.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Gragas}} hurls a cask to the target location that explodes upon impact, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|airborne|knocking them back}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Gragas''' hurls a cask that travels to the target location over {{fd|0.5}} seconds, exploding on impact to deal {{as|magic damage}} to all enemies within the area and {{tip|airborne|knock them back}} 900 units, though not through terrain, from the epicenter of the explosion, as well as granting {{tip|sight}} of the area for 1 second.
